properties.body: NAVAREA XX 97/26 CHART RUS 10100 SOUTH-EASTERN PART OF BARENTS SEA. 1. HALF-SUBMERGED OBJECT 2 METERS LENGTH ADRIFT 020830 UTC JUL IN 70-47.0N 049-19.0E. ALL SHIPS IN AREA TO KEEP SHARP LOOK OUT AND REPORT TO MARINE RESCUE SUBCENTER ARKHANGELSK. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 050830 UTC JUL 26.= NNNN
